message:
fix(harness): update Tree and Input API usage

- Remove deprecated .expanded(true) calls from TreeNode (nodes expand by default)
- Use .cursor() instead of .cursor_position() for display
- Render tree block separately and tree widget inside it
- Remove unnecessary &format! to &str conversions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
